{{Quote|Having been left unsupervised during a massage therapy session, a young patient, Rith Murisson of Krnay, discovered that the treatments had left a series of disfiguring suction marks on her back.|Senior Anthropologist Mammon Hoole, ''The Essential Guide to Alien Species''|<ref name="TEGAS">[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']]</ref>}}
'''Krnay''' was a location<ref name="TEGAS" /> in the [[Krnay system/Legends|Krnay system]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Vilonis sector/Legends|Vilonis sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /><ref name="Planetnamia" /> The young [[Rith Murisson]], who at one point underwent a [[Umgullian blob massage therapy]] session on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Umgul/Legends|Umgul]], hailed from Krnay. [[Senior Anthropologist]] [[Mammon Hoole]] later noted Murisson's origin in an account of her experience on Umgul that was eventually included in the [[Book/Legends|book]] ''[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''.<ref name="TEGAS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Krnay was introduced in the [[2001]] reference book [[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']] by [[Ann Margaret Lewis (real person)|Ann Margaret Lewis]].<ref name="TEGAS" />
